title: mirabilis gausapoides
intro: Mirabilis gausapoides, commonly known as the four o'clock flower or Mexican four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). The plant is used medicinally due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Mirabilis gausapoides have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis gausapoides are often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
